description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsWhite shoe with synthetic upper, perforations, overlays and a haul loopPadded tongue and innerFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with patterned lugs and an arched midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
